overall.description: First-person exploration through a futuristic cyberpunk city in Cyberpunk 2077. The player walks from a covered neon-lit arcade, crosses a sunlit intersection, passes a Militech security checkpoint with an armored vehicle, and continues along a debris-strewn sidewalk beneath an elevated highway. Bright midday sun illuminates towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements and neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian arcade with glass storefronts

events.description: exits covered walkway into bright direct sunlight causing sharp shadow transition
moves from enclosed arcade to open street intersection with crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk, approaching the open intersection with tall buildings ahead

entered.detail: futuristic glass facade with cyan neon trim and holographic displays inside
glowing cyan light strips running along the building edge
broad yellow zebra stripes marking the pedestrian crossing ahead
tall building with teal facade covered in vertical neon signage

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a covered pedestrian arcade with futuristic glass storefronts illuminated by cyan neon trim. The camera walks forward, transitioning from the sheltered walkway into bright midday sunlight at an open intersection. Tall commercial buildings with teal facades and neon signage rise in the distance beyond the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with security checkpoint ahead

events.description: turns right at the intersection corner, changing direction from forward to rightward
approaches Militech security checkpoint with armored vehicle blocking the road ahead

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and turning right onto the sidewalk, approaching the security checkpoint

notable_agents.action: Militech armored SUV parked at checkpoint blocking the road

entered.detail: concrete building with curved corner facade and external air conditioning units
tall blue automated vending kiosk on the sidewalk corner
large black armored vehicle with Militech branding and red accents
red and white striped barrier blocking vehicle access

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the sunlit intersection, turning right at a rounded corner building with a blue vending machine. As the walk continues, a Militech security checkpoint comes into view with a large black armored SUV and barrier gate blocking the road ahead. The open street allows full sky visibility with harsh midday shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: security checkpoint under elevated highway overpass

events.description: passes close to the Militech vehicle and soldier, temporarily blocking the view ahead
steam vents release vapor clouds near the walkway under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking past the security checkpoint, moving under the concrete overpass structure

notable_agents.action: Militech soldier in tactical gear standing guard next to the armored vehicle
Militech armored SUV with tinted windows and heavy plating parked at barrier

entered.detail: massive concrete elevated highway casting deep shadows over the walkway
ground-level vent emitting white steam clouds across the sidewalk
shop entrance with purple neon lighting and digital displays

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the Militech checkpoint where a soldier stands guard beside the armored SUV. Moving under the massive concrete overpass, the lighting shifts to deep shadow with steam vents creating atmospheric effects. The sheltered walkway continues past a purple-lit storefront while the overpass structure dominates the sky view.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy commercial sidewalk under elevated highway

events.description: moves from checkpoint area into busier commercial zone with pedestrians and advertisements
slight lateral adjustment to navigate around pedestrians on the narrow sidewalk

agents.ego_description: navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic under the overpass, passing various storefronts

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians in varied clothing walking along the shaded sidewalk

entered.detail: large white billboard with red Nicola Cola branding and product imagery
row of palm trees visible beyond the overpass shadow in the sunlit street
continuous line of shops and commercial entrances under the overpass
large floating holographic advertisement displaying animated content

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a busier commercial sidewalk under the overpass, populated by pedestrians walking in various directions. Large advertisements including a Nicola Cola billboard line the left side, while palm trees and holographic billboards are visible in the sunlit distance. The camera navigates through the moderate crowd while remaining in the shadow of the elevated highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with construction barriers and debris

events.description: emerges from deep overpass shadow into brighter area with visible sky and palm trees
increasing amount of trash, broken furniture, and urban debris visible along the walkway

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past construction barriers and scattered debris, moving away from the overpass

entered.detail: red and white striped construction barriers lining the edge of the road
massive floating advertisement showing animated neon content between buildings
broken white concrete bench with debris scattered on and around it
red trash can overflowing with garbage bags and litter

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from under the overpass into a brighter area with partial sky visibility and palm trees lining the street. The sidewalk shows signs of urban decay with damaged benches, overflowing trash cans, and scattered debris. Construction barriers run along the right side of the road while massive holographic advertisements float between the futuristic skyscrapers ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered neon arcade into the harsh midday light of a futuristic city, eventually passing under a massive overpass into a decaying urban district. It begins within a covered pedestrian walkway illuminated by cyan neon trim before emerging into the bright sunlight of an open intersection surrounded by teal commercial buildings. As the camera crosses the street and turns a corner past a blue vending machine, the scene opens up to reveal a Militech security checkpoint guarded by a soldier and a black armored SUV. The lighting then shifts abruptly into deep shadow and atmospheric steam as the camera moves beneath a concrete overpass, navigating a crowded sidewalk lined with Nicola Cola billboards and purple-lit storefronts. Finally, the camera emerges from the shade into a brighter area where palm trees and floating holographic advertisements contrast with the urban decay of damaged benches and scattered debris.
